nodes.title: Don’t Expect to See ‘Robby the Robot’ Working at The PM Group Anytime Soon!
A Conversation About Personal Safety and a Safer Path
Bad News for Millennials as Affordable Housing is Scarce

pageContext.content:
We are proud to showcase Audicles Hearing Services’ new TV commercial that began airing this month. As an agency, we were tasked with providing a breakthrough concept without breaking the budget. In an industry where ads typically include boring clinic tours and testimonials, we developed “Walter”, a 2-D, animated character who knows the woes of hearing loss all too well. Audicles Hearing Services provides hearing aids with the latest technology that enhance the lives of those coping with hearing loss. Audicles listens, so you can hear better. Check out the new spot!

 

Audicles Hearing Services – Meet Walter

 
Meet Walter! Walter was finding it harder and harder to hear, especially from those closest to him. Then, he came to Audicles Hearing Services. Now, Walter isn’t missing out on anything!
